# launchArguments

**Instance Property**

The arguments that pass to the application on launch.

## Declaration

```swift
var launchArguments: [String] { get set }
```

## Discussion

If not modified, these are the arguments that Xcode passes to the application on launch. You can change, add to, or remove the arguments. Unlike with [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/Foundation/Process], you can also modify these arguments after the application launches. Such changes don’t affect the current launch session, but do take effect the next time the application launches.

## Launching the application

- **launch()**: Launches the application.
- **launchEnvironment**: The environment variables that pass to the application on launch.
- **open(_:)**: Launches the application by URL.
